content.description: Per-session sign-in detail for investigating specific users or incidents. Traces each login through ADFS and correlates with Duo MFA events, showing outcome, protocol, path, and timing.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>ADFS: Attack Surface Dashboard v2</label>
    <description>Per-session sign-in detail for investigating specific users or incidents. Traces each login through ADFS and correlates with Duo MFA events, showing outcome, protocol, path, and timing.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[
{
	"title": "ADFS: Attack Surface Dashboard v2",
	"description": "Per-session sign-in detail for investigating specific users or incidents. Traces each login through ADFS and correlates with Duo MFA events, showing outcome, protocol, path, and timing.",
	"inputs": {
		"input_global_trp": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "@d,now",
				"token": "global_time"
			},
			"title": "Global Time Range",
			"type": "input.timerange"
		},
		"input_outcome": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "*",
				"items": [
					{
						"label": "All",
						"value": "*"
					},
					{
						"label": "Success",
						"value": "Success"
					},
					{
						"label": "Token Failure",
						"value": "Token Failure"
					},
					{
						"label": "Credential Failure",
						"value": "Credential Failure"
					}
				],
				"token": "outcome_filter"
			},
			"title": "Outcome Filter",
			"type": "input.dropdown"
		},
		"input_user": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "*",
				"token": "user_input"
			},
			"title": "User Filter",
			"type": "input.text"
		}
	},
	"defaults": {
		"dataSources": {
			"ds.search": {
				"options": {
					"queryParameters": {
						"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
						"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
					}
				}
			}
		}
	},
	"visualizations": {
		"viz_duo_detail": {
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_duo_detail"
			},
			"options": {
				"columnFormat": {
					"time": {
						"width": 60
					},
					"user": {
						"width": 60
					}
				},
				"count": 50,
				"dataOverlayMode": "none",
				"drilldown": "none",
				"showInternalFields": false,
				"showRowNumbers": false
			},
			"title": "Duo MFA Details",
			"type": "splunk.table"
		},
		"viz_outcome_pie": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_outcome_dist"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "SSO Outcome Distribution",
			"type": "splunk.pie"
		},
		"viz_sso_details": {
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_sso_details"
			},
			"eventHandlers": [
				{
					"options": {
						"earliest": "-30m",
						"latest": "now",
						"newTab": true,
						"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) \"$row.Activity ID$\" | rex \"Activity ID:\\\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | sort _time",
						"type": "search"
					},
					"type": "drilldown.linkToSearch"
				}
			],
			"options": {
				"columnFormat": {
					"Activity ID": {
						"width": 123
					},
					"App URL": {
						"width": 180
					},
					"Duo App": {
						"width": 150
					},
					"Duo Factor": {
						"width": 160
					},
					"Duo Offset": {
						"width": 70
					},
					"Duration": {
						"width": 60
					},
					"Events": {
						"width": 60
					},
					"Flow": {
						"width": 60
					},
					"MFA": {
						"width": 60
					},
					"MFA Method": {
						"width": 91
					},
					"Path": {
						"width": 180
					},
					"Protocol": {
						"width": 60
					},
					"Result": {
						"width": 60
					},
					"Stage Seq": {
						"width": 186
					},
					"Time": {
						"width": 66
					},
					"User": {
						"width": 74
					}
				},
				"count": 50,
				"drilldown": "row",
				"headerVisibility": "fixed",
				"showInternalFields": false
			},
			"title": "SSO Details",
			"type": "splunk.table"
		},
		"viz_timeline": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_timeline"
			},
			"options": {
				"legendDisplay": "off"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "SSO Timeline",
			"type": "splunk.line"
		},
		"viz_total": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_total"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "SSO Total",
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue"
		}
	},
	"dataSources": {
		"ds_duo_detail": {
			"name": "Duo MFA Details",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=duo username=\"$user_input$\"\n| spath\n| search result!=\"\" integration!=PAM\n| eval time=strftime(_time,\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\")\n| eval user=mvindex(username, 0), factor=mvindex(factor, 0), integration=mvindex(integration, 0), result=mvindex(result, 0), reason=mvindex(reason, 0)\n| table time user integration factor result reason\n| sort - time",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_outcome_dist": {
			"name": "SSO Outcome Distribution",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR (EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203) AND (\"$user_input$\" OR \"the organization-AD\\\\$user_input$\"))) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| stats min(_time) as start_time values(EventCode) as stages by activity_id\n| eval cred_ok=if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval cred_fail=if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval token_ok=if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval token_fail=if(mvfind(stages,\"1201\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval outcome=case(\n    token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1,\"Success\",\n    token_fail==1,\"Token Failure\",\n    cred_fail==1,\"Credential Failure\",\n    1=1,\"Other\")\n| where outcome!=\"Other\" AND (\"$outcome_filter$\"=\"*\" OR outcome=\"$outcome_filter$\")\n| stats count by outcome",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_sso_details": {
			"name": "SSO Details with Duo correlation",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR (EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203) AND (\"$user_input$\" OR \"the organization-AD\\\\$user_input$\"))) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex field=_raw \"redirect_uri=(?<ru_raw>[^&]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<UserId>(?<xml_user>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<RelyingParty>(?<relying_party_raw>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<AuthProtocol>(?<auth_protocol>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<ProxyServer>(?<proxy_server>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<MfaPerformed>(?<mfa_flag_txt>true|false)</MfaPerformed>\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<MfaMethod>(?<mfa_method_tmp>[^<]+)</MfaMethod>\"\n| eval mfa_flag=if(mfa_flag_txt==\"true\",1,0)\n| eval mfa_method=if(EventCode==1200,mfa_method_tmp,null())\n| eval ru1=urldecode(trim(ru_raw))\n| eval ru2=replace(ru1,\"\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}(?:\\s\\d{2}:\\d{2}:\\d{2})?\",\"\")\n| eval ru3=replace(ru2,\"[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36}\",\"\")\n| eval ru4=replace(replace(ru3,\"A\",\"://\"),\"F\",\"/\")\n| eval ru5=replace(ru4,\"^(https?)0*\\d+/\",\"\\1://\")\n| eval ru6=replace(ru5,\"/[0-9A-Fa-f]/\",\"/\")\n| eval redirect_uri=replace(ru6,\"^(https?)[A-Za-z0-9]{2}/\",\"\\1://\")\n| eval redirect_uri=replace(redirect_uri,\"/+\",\"/\")\n| eval redirect_uri=replace(redirect_uri,\"^https:/\",\"https://host.example.gov
content.label: ADFS: Attack Surface Dashboard v2
